name: swahili-health-mcp
description: MCP server for Kenya health data via DHIS2/KHIS public API. Enables AI agents to query Kenya health facilities, maternal health indicators, immunization coverage, and disease surveillance data. Swahili-native tool descriptions for Swahili-language AI agents.

tools.name: search_health_facilities
tools.description: Tafuta vituo vya afya Kenya / Search Kenya health facilities by county and level. Returns facility name, location, level (1-6), and services available.

tools.name: get_maternal_health_indicators
tools.description: Pata takwimu za afya ya uzazi / Get maternal health indicators for a Kenya county — ANC visits, skilled birth attendance, postnatal care rates.

tools.name: get_immunization_coverage
tools.description: Pata kiwango cha chanjo / Get child immunization coverage by vaccine (BCG, DPT3, Measles, OPV) and county in Kenya.

relatedServers.name: mpesa-mcp
relatedServers.description: M-PESA Daraja API MCP server by same author

envVars.name: GOOGLE_API_KEY
envVars.description: Google Gemini API key for AI-enhanced responses (optional — server works without it)
